ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "time_pst" TEXT /* Time of the data collection in Pacific Standard Time (PST) */,
  "air_temp_f" REAL /* Air temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "dew_point_f" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "rel_hum_percent" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_dir" TEXT /* Wind direction and speed (e.g., NW@1.0) */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_gust_mph" REAL /* Wind gust speed in miles per hour */,
  "tot_prec_in" REAL /* Total precipitation in inches */,
  "solar_rad_w_m2" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "atm_press_inhg" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "download_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was downloaded into the system */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating data quality issues */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (e.g., Morgan, The Dalles, Wasco County) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation_ft" REAL /* Elevation of the station in feet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the station was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Air Temp, Dew Point) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., °F, %, mph) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Real-Time, Historical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the interval (e.g., 15 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size_mb" REAL /* Size of the data file in megabytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being versioned */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point with the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
